remember: Students will be able to recall and list out the basic concepts of probability.
Students will be able to identify and explain the basic principles of probability.
Students will be able to state and use the axioms of probability.
understand: Students will be able to understand and differentiate between discrete and continuous random variables.
Students will be able to explain the concepts of probability distribution and probability density function.
Students will be able to understand the concept of expected value and variance.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of probability to solve problems.
Students will be able to use probability distributions to solve real-life problems.
Students will be able to calculate probabilities and expected values using given data.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze and interpret the results of probability experiments.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different probability distributions.
Students will be able to identify and explain the limitations of probability theory.

ncert_objectives: To explain the concept of probability and its importance.
To understand and work with different types of probability distributions.
To calculate probabilities and expected values using given data.
To apply the concepts of probability to solve real-life problems.
board_exam_objectives: To calculate probabilities of events using the formula P(A) = (Number of favorable outcomes)/(Total number of outcomes).
To identify and explain the difference between independent and dependent events.
To solve problems involving binomial distributions and Poisson distributions.
